headline: Will Higher Costs Hurt Skyward Specialty's Q1 Earnings?
summary: SKWD heads into Q1 earnings with strong premium and investment income growth forecasts, but rising acquisition costs and a higher combined ratio may weigh.

headline: CNO Beats Q1 Earnings Estimates on Higher Life and Health Premiums
summary: CNO Financial beats Q1 EPS estimates as life and health premiums rise, boosting revenues despite higher benefits and investment losses.

headline: VIRT Beats Q1 Earnings Estimates on Execution Services Unit Strength
summary: Virtu Financial's Q1 EPS jumps 72% y/y and crushes estimates as Execution Services and Market Making surge, boosting trading income despite higher costs.
